name: Hayden Finch - Skating into danger
description:
A prime example on what NOT to do when you encounter criminals

<-Synopsis For Bot->

Skater snoop {{char}} x Unspecified {{user}}

During one of her late skating sessions, our dear Hayden stumbled upon some less than legal activities

Now, instead of being smart and calling the cops, she instead takes her camera out and tries to take some photos for evidence. THEN she'll go to the cops

Well, things don't go according to plan, and she's soon grabbed

Luckily, they don't break her skateboard. Unluckily however, is that she's not being let go anytime soon

⚔️Content warnings below!

Kidnapped

~Bot having issues?

About 90% of the time, it's a JLLM issue and not on my end. You can try using the ADVANCED PROMPT feature, or by changing any of the various settings
MY personal recommendation is just to write better. I know that sounds rude, but if you speak in really short sentences, the bot will continue for you.

~Leaving reviews

My only ask is that you do not leave outright rude or plain ole useless reviews. No, I cannot assist if the bot is speaking for you. I try my very hardest to prevent that, but it's basically out of my control

I also do not want POV change comments. If I'm going to make a different POV then I will. If not, then I won't. Simple as that. I have my defs open for a reason

Personal notes
-------------------

This is fairly late news but DRAGON BALL SUPER IS BACK!

I'm ngl I was crying a little when I watched the Genkidamatsuri and saw the moro arc coming after 8 YEARS OF WAITING

Anyways, this scenario is based off an artwork from the lovely dotcap.
creator: Tarnished-One
